case_title: EDWIN S MASANGKAY VS. YOLANDA REPPARD

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,070.00 FILED BY MASANGKAY, EDWIN S AS TO DEFENDANT REPPARD, YOLANDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-05-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-05-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MASANGKAY, EDWIN S RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REPPARD, YOLANDA $2,070.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,170.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SC-105 REQUEST FILED BY DEFENDANT ON 4/30/18. THE REQUEST IS DENIED. THE COURT ORDERS: "RE-SUBMIT WITH PROOF OF PAYMENT AND A COPY OF A CERTIFIED LETTER TO PLAINTIFF REQUESTING SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. ALSO, SC-105 MUST BE SERVED."
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SC-105 ANSWER FORM MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 04/23/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
